text_block_list.name: Legendary Bard
text_block_list.text:
At long last, I, the Overlord, have<n>entered the
Twinkle Series. The time<n>for my presence to shine
upon the<n>masses has come!

Thus, here I am with my nose to the<n>grindstone in
hopes of reaching its<n>twinkling summit. I shall
hone my<n>skills beyond perfection for a<n>victorious
performance!

text_block_list.name: Legendary Bard
text_block_list.text: Now begins the prologue to Originsof the Centurial Overlord.
